messages.content: I want you to act as an English translator, spelling corrector and writing improver. I will speak to you in any language and you will detect the language, translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in English. You should use artificial intelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level English words and sentences. Keep the meaning same, but make them more logical, concise and powerful. I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations. My first sentence/paragraph is "与IVW相比，MR-Egger回归分析法考虑了截距项的存在，可用于检测对工具变量假设的违反，但可能存在偏差。"

Compared to IVW, the MR-Egger regression analysis accounts for the presence of the intercept term and can be employed to detect violations of the instrumental variable assumption, albeit with potential bias.

My first sentence/paragraph is "当至少有一半的IV有效时，Weighted median则用于检验所有工具SNPs的中位数效应，从而产生对效应的无偏估计。"

When at least half of the instrumental variables (IVs) are valid, the weighted median method is employed to examine the median effects of all instrumental SNPs, thereby generating an unbiased estimation of the effects.

My first sentence/paragraph is "在此项双向研究中，利用两个GWASs的炎性细胞因子和口腔病变的SNPs进行二者因果关系的测定（图 2）。"
In this bidirectional study, the determination of the causal relationship between inflammatory cytokines and oral lesions was carried out using SNPs from two GWASs (Figure 2).

My first sentence/paragraph is "图2：此为孟德尔随机化（MR）分析过程图，以遗传变异作为工具变量，推断炎性细胞因子与口腔病变的因果关系。此示意图中满足了相关性假设、独立性假设和排他性假设这三个核心假设。"

Figure 2: This depicts the graphical representation of the Mendelian Randomization (MR) analysis process, utilizing genetic variation as instrumental variables to infer the causal relationship between inflammatory cytokines and oral lesions. The diagram satisfies the three fundamental hypotheses, namely the assumption of relevance, independence, and exclusivity.

My first sentence/paragraph is "敏感性分析可以检测出潜在MR估计值的异质性和水平多效性。本实验采用Cochran’s Q检验进行异质性的测量，如Cochran’s Q检验推导的P>0.05则视为异质性较小。"

Sensitivity analysis allows for the detection of heterogeneity and horizontal pleiotropy in potential MR estimates. In this experiment, the measurement of heterogeneity is conducted using Cochran's Q test, where a derived P value greater than 0.05 is considered indicative of lower heterogeneity.

My first sentence/paragraph is "在水平多效性方面，本实验采用MR-Egger回归分析法来评估SNPs的潜在多效性，Egger-intercept检验推导P＞0.05则表明不存在水平多效性。"

Regarding the issue of horizontal pleiotropy, this experiment employs the MR-Egger regression analysis to assess the potential pleiotropic effects of SNPs. A derived P value greater than 0.05 from the Egger intercept test indicates the absence of horizontal pleiotropy.

My first sentence/paragraph is "除此之外，本实验进行了留一分析以测试SNPs的一致性，逐个留下每一个SNP，如果因果关系在排除非特异性SNP后仍然显著，则可为该关联提供可信证据。"

Additionally, this experiment employed leave-one-out analysis to test the consistency of SNPs. By individually excluding each SNP and observing if the causal relationship remains significant after excluding non-specific SNPs, credible evidence can be provided for the association.

My first sentence/paragraph is "当全基因组意义的临界值设置为5×10-8时,共有41个可获得的口腔疾病相关细胞因子具有三个或更多有效的遗传变异。基于先前开发的筛选方案，分别有446、384、444、346、112和384个SNPs作为牙龈出血、牙齿松动、口腔溃疡、牙龈疼痛、牙周疾病和牙痛的IVs。每种炎性细胞因子的F统计值均大于10,表明弱工具变量不显著。"

When the genome-wide significance threshold was set at 5×10-8, a total of 41 obtainable oral disease-related cytokines were found to have three or more valid genetic variations. Based on the previously developed screening criteria, there were respectively 446, 384, 444, 346, 112, and 384 SNPs identified as instrumental variables (IVs) for gingival bleeding, tooth mobility, oral ulcers, gingival pain, periodontal disease, and toothache. The F-statistics values for each inflammatory cytokine were all greater than 10, indicating that weak instrumental variables were not significant.

My first sentence/paragraph is "IVW方法发现,G-CSF（OR=1.005,95%CI:1.001-1.010,P=0.014）、IL-12-P70（OR=0.995,95%CI:0.991-1.000,P=0.046）和IL-17（OR=0.994,95%CI:0.989-0.999,
P=0.016）水平与牙龈出血患病率呈正相关；EOTAXIN（OR=1.002,95%CI:1.000
-1.005,P=0.042）、HGF（OR=0.997,95%CI:0.994-1.000,P=0.036）、IL-17（OR=0.9
95,95%CI:0.991-0.998,P=0.002）和MIF（OR=1.003,95%CI:1.000-1.006,P=0.025）水平与牙齿松动患病率呈正相关；IL-16（OR=1.003,95%CI:1.000-1.005,P=0.052）、MIP-1a（OR=0.993,95%CI:0.988-0.998,P=0.005）、RANTES（OR=1.005,95%CI:1
.000-1.009,P=0.032）和SCGF-b（OR=0.998,95%CI:0.995-1.000,P=0.029）水平与口腔溃疡患病率呈正相关；G-CSF（OR=0.997,95%CI:0.994-1.000,P=0.044）和IL-10（OR=1.002,95%CI:1.000-1.004,P=0.043）水平与牙龈疼痛患病率呈正相关；FGF-BASIC（OR=0.995,95%CI:0.991-1.000,P=0.042）水平与牙齿疼痛患病率呈正相关。"

The IVW method revealed a positive correlation between gingival bleeding prevalence and levels of G-CSF (OR=1.005, 95% CI: 1.001-1.010, P=0.014), IL-12-P70 (OR=0.995, 95% CI: 0.991-1.000, P=0.046), and IL-17 (OR=0.994, 95% CI: 0.989-0.999, P=0.016). Similarly, prevalence of tooth mobility showed a positive association with levels of EOTAXIN (OR=1.002, 95% CI: 1.000-1.005, P=0.042), HGF (OR=0.997, 95% CI: 0.994-1.000, P=0.036), IL-17 (OR=0.995, 95% CI: 0.991-0.998, P=0.002), and MIF (OR=1.003, 95% CI: 1.000-1.006, P=0.025). Furthermore, oral ulcers prevalence demonstrated a positive correlation with IL-16 (OR=1.003, 95% CI: 1.000-1.005, P=0.052), MIP-1a (OR=0.993, 95% CI: 0.988-0.998, P=0.005), RANTES (OR=1.005, 95% CI: 1.000-1.009, P=0.032), and SCGF-b (OR=0.998, 95% CI: 0.995-1.000, P=0.029). Gingival pain prevalence exhibited a positive correlation with G-CSF (OR=0.997, 95% CI: 0.994-1.000, P=0.044) and IL-10 (OR=1.002, 95% CI: 1.000-1.004, P=0.043) levels. Lastly, toothache prevalence showed a positive correlation with FGF-BASIC (OR=0.995, 95% CI: 0.991-1.000, P=0.042) levels.

My first sentence/paragraph is "MR-Egger回归分析法同样证明上述IL-16（OR=1.006,95%CI:1.002-1.010
,P=0.013）和EOTAXIN（OR=1.010,95%CI:1.003-1.018,P=0.017）水平分别与口腔溃疡和牙龈疼痛的患病率呈正相关。而Weighted median则同样进一步印证了IL-17（OR=0.995,95%CI:0.990-1.000,P=0.046）和IL-16（OR=1.004,
95%CI:1.001-1.007,P=0.024）水平分别与牙齿松动和口腔溃疡的患病率呈正相关。"

The MR-Egger regression analysis also demonstrated a positive correlation between levels of IL-16 (OR=1.006, 95% CI: 1.002-1.010, P=0.013) and EOTAXIN (OR=1.010, 95% CI: 1.003-1.018, P=0.017) with the prevalence of oral ulcers and gingival pain, respectively. Furthermore, the weighted median method provided additional evidence supporting the positive associations between levels of IL-17 (OR=0.995, 95% CI: 0.990-1.000, P=0.046) and IL-16 (OR=1.004, 95% CI: 1.001-1.007, P=0.024) with the prevalence of tooth mobility and oral ulcers, respectively.
